name: Package Manager
description: Install, update and uninstall extensions and codex packages from connected file registries
title: Package Manager
subtitle: Install, update and uninstall extensions and codex packages from connected file registries

messages.no_installed: No packages installed yet. Browse a registry or upload files to install your first package.
messages.no_browse: No registries linked to this realm. Connect a file registry from the Settings page first.
messages.no_browse_results: This registry has no published packages.
messages.registry_load_failed: Failed to load packages from registry {id}: {error}
messages.confirm_uninstall: Uninstall {id}? Any data the package wrote to the canister will remain, but the package itself will be removed.
messages.no_updates_available: All installed packages are up to date.
messages.upload_dropzone: Drop a folder of extension or codex files here, or click to choose files
messages.upload_size_warning: Total payload {size} exceeds the ~1.8 MB ingress safe limit. The install call will likely be rejected; consider publishing through a file registry instead.
